items.title: Miller & Brazil are headliners for Kings workout tomorrow
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Miller & Brazil are headliners for Kings workout tomorrow

Miller started @ FSU. 

Scotty Barnes comp when he first got there…Big game at Kansas.. his signature game this yr.

Brazil is a freak athlete...initially played for Mussleman at Arkansas..Lob threat. Shot blocker. Live body. He’s switchable
